channel.title: Epigenetics on BRYSGO
channel.description: Recent content in Epigenetics on BRYSGO

item.title: Measuring Cancer by Its Chaos, Not Its Quantity
item.description: The most promising liquid biopsy tests detect cancer best when it’s already at Stage IV — which is roughly the opposite of what early detection means. GRAIL’s Galleri test, the most prominent multi-cancer screening product on the market, achieves 90% sensitivity at Stage IV. At Stage I, that number drops to 18% across all cancer types. You are more likely to miss an early-stage cancer than catch it. The test is, functionally, a very expensive way to confirm what a symptomatic patient probably already suspects.
